title: An effective eye cream for men!
body:
I have used Challenger Men's Primo eye cream a couple of times at night and I noticed that it absorbs quickly and leaves skin very smooth. A little cream goes a long way. The texture is creamy but not much oily. It contains a wide spectrum of effective ingredients for refreshing, revitalizing, and removing puffiness and dark circles. I have noticed a reduction in around-eye dark circles. Caffeine, Hyaluronic acid, and Aloe Vera are the main active ingredients that are beneficial for long-lasting hydration.
Overall, the current eye cream from Challenger is a great and effective product for long-lasting hydration and puffiness removal while it has a good value for the price compared to similar products for men,

title: Nice, minty, but overpriced shampoo
body: This is a nice shampoo. I got it to help with hair growth, it hasn’t done that and I doubt it will. The tea tree oil is very low on the list of ingredients. This is a fairly costly shampoo, 16 ounces for $16. It lathers nicely, it has many questionable ingredients, no sls, but other foaming agents. It is very pepperminty. It really invigorates the scalp, I enjoy it. It’s very gentle on my hair, it rinses out nicely and leaves my hair very silky and manageable. Don’t expect tea tree benefits from this shampoo the ingredient is hardly in the bottle."

title: Affordable Mens Eye Cream That Works
body:
This is an effective, premium eye cream at a very reasonable price. I'd say it works as good or better than product double or triple the price, and it covers all of the bases. Recently 50 years old, I have been using it for a while now and can attest to a reduction in the effects of aging around my eyes. Dark circles are all but gone, puffiness and wrinkles are reduced, and my skin feels hydrated.

I put it on in the morning and evening. It absorbs quickly leaving skin soft and smooth. The container looks good next to my sink along with my other Challenger products and the pump dispenses well. I really like this line of skin care from Primo and plan to keep using it.

Made in the USA

title: High quality eye cream for men
body:
This eye cream's bottle proudly proclaims that future you will thank you for using this. Well, I'm the future version of myself (at least compared to when I started using this a month ago), and in general, I'm glad I started using it, but my expectations for what it would do had to be modified slightly. Let me explain. I'm in my mid to late 30s, and like many people, I have some dark circles under my eyes. I've never really tried anything much in the past to get rid of the circles before, so they've just been sitting there, getting darker from years of life (and perhaps not enough sleep). My initial expectation was that this would offer some sort of dramatic improvement in the circles with daily use; I've used this daily for nearly a month now and have found some small amounts of improvement, but when I talked to my wife, who uses stuff like this regularly (and is a little younger than I am, but more importantly looks much younger than I do), she said to think of it more as a way to prevent future worsening than to completely rejuvenate the skin around my eyes. That made me a little sad, but with some obvious improvement (and certainly no further signs of aging), I feel pretty good about what this cream does.

I use one pump and it's enough for both eyes (perhaps even a little much). It hasn't got much aroma to speak of. The first little while I was using it, I noticed that it would sting just the tiniest bit on application (around my eyes, obviously not in my eyes), but after continued use, the stinging has stopped. I guess my skin got used to it. I use it after applying face wash and some facial cream. It's a bit pricey, but the quality seems good, and as I've said, there has been some clear impact, if not as dramatic as I hoped. The good thing, too, is that the quantity seems pretty generous. Since I use one pump either once or twice a day, it seems like it will last for quite some time before running out.

***I write reviews as a hobby because I love trying out electronics, clothing, household products, kitchen devices, and more. My hope is that my review will guide you to make a more informed choice about whether or not to make a purchase. If this review helped you in your decision-making today, please let me know with a helpful vote. Have a great day!***

title: Best Stuff Ever
body:
I never write reviews, but this stuff is great. I think its a little odd that it is specifically listed as "men's" as though only a man would want to create texture with firm hold for their hairstyle.

The things I love most about this product are 1) it is completely unscented. I wish more products were unscented because scent sensitivity and allergies are rampant and the world is smelly enough without adding yet another scented product to it. 2) It really adds fantastic texture and has a great firm hold. I have fine hair that is always looking for an excuse to go limp and be flat...this stuff gives me great volume and holds all day with no issues, even in super high heat and humidity. I think the biggest learning curve for me was taking a little, pea sized scoop out and making sure to rub it into my fingertips until there was no more white showing, it was just clear, then apply it to the roots and then the chunks here and there I want to hold and texture. It washes off hands fast and easy with just water and a little soap and it washes out of hair super easy also. I don't use conditioner in my hair and i do not find this product overly drying at all.

I was afraid to order this because I've gone through so many products that just don't work and it's such a waste, but this stuff is awesome. I've ordered it twice now and I'm writing this review because I want this company to stay in business and keep making this fabulous unscented hair goop! If you are someone who has to use unscented products out of necessity- then you probably know how limited the choices are when it comes to hair products and the ones you do find are usually a massive compromise- this one isn't! It's really great quality stuff that works perfectly! No compromise! (Maybe this company will start making unscented hairspray that doesn't suck too!!! 🤞).

title: Worked to halt my hair loss!!
body:
"Works for me! I bought this because I started losing A LOT of hair for unknown reasons (not stressed, didn't change my diet, didn't try new hair products, and I don't use blow dryers or straighteners. I was at a loss as to how to stop my hair from falling completely. (and I am only 36 years old; and do not have hair loss in my family genetics)
I did some research about natural remedies and tea tree oil came up. So I found this shampoo and then another brand conditioner (Shiny Leaf) also with tea tree oil.
The price seems fair for the volume and amount of tea tree oil in the ingredients.
It works! - - My hair immediately slowed down it's excessive loss and I just get the normal amount that comes out when washing it."

title: It truly is unscented!
body: My wife lost her sense of smell and taste due to covid several months ago, but a few months ago she has since started to get them back. Unfortunately, they’ve come back a bit wonky. Almost all hair products cause her to smell “wet dog”. So, after being called a wet dog for the 137th time, I went through 3 other popular brand name hair products to no avail until finally trying Challenger’s Clean. I got the thumbs up from the wife, and immediately ordered another one for my gym bag. It has a pretty good hold as claimed, I just have to adapt to how much to use. It doesn’t rinse out quite as easily as the other products (as I don’t like to over wash my hair), but I’ll make it work because I can actually be in close proximity of my wife again without being told I smell like a wet dog.

title: Unseated, great hold, washes out clean.
body: Really like this product. Great hold that lasts all day with natural hair shine. Washes out clean, restyle-able through out the day. Not flakey. Etc. Just a really good hair product.

title: Not just for men
body:
LOVE the hold of this pomade! I have severe fragrance allergies and searched to find a hair gel that would hold my spiked hair and not cause a reaction to the smell.

A little goes a long way so it’s very economical too.

title: I LOVE THIS!! NOT JUST FOR MEN!
body:
I LOVE this eye cream!

My eyes are pretty dry. My eyelids get dry and my under eyes get really dry. Whenever I apply concealer, it will always look horrible unless I make sure my under eyes are moisturized well enough. I’ve been using Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich cream, but it’s $32 for a jar. A little of it goes a long way so it lasts me a while, but I still wanted to find a cheaper alternative. I found this, which I think I might like even more than the glossier!

It is a thicker cream, but not thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin easily. It absorbs quickly, leaving behind a dewy, moisturized look to the eyes. My concealer goes over it well. I’ve really been enjoying this! So much so I decided to give the face moisturizer a try!

If you’re like me and have dry under eyes and are looking for something to moisturize them, TRY THIS! I don’t think you’ll be disappointed!
reviewer: Lover of All Things Beauty - VINE VOICE

title: Very happy with the results
body: I have very thin and somewhat thinning hair that I wear short. I switched to pomades, clays, and creams several years ago. The products worked okay, but they all caused my scalp to break out, no matter how small of an amount I would use. I finally broke down and purchased an expensive brand from a salon, but the result was even worse. So, I searched the interwebs for hypoallergenic pomade and found Challenger Clean. I gave it a shot, and after about three weeks I am proud to report that the results are outstanding. My acne has cleared up and has not returned. This product works great with my hair. I don't have to use much so that just increases the value. I comb it in slightly damp hair and style. Once it dries and sets I run my comb back through my hair and the style stays and my hair is left looking natural as if I never used any product at all. Three out of five stars, wouldn't change a thing!

It is easy to apply, does not need a lot of product for my short hair and keeps it in place all day while still looking natural. I highly recommend this product.

However, if I am going to exercise or go out into weather (like wind/breeze), I'll solidify my look with a little hairspray after I've molded my hair with this product. Overall, medium hold with no shine, which is what I want.

I use it right out of the shower (my favorite way) or even on dry hair it works GREAT. I CANNOT recommend this stuff enough. And it will last FOREVER because you really don’t need that much at all. I like that it’s not super gooey it’s more like a thick balm or lotion consistency if that makes sense. Works great for me :)

The hold is firm but it was very flexible and most going into my hair (which I like…I am not a fan of super hard clay). I also like that I can move it around during the day if I want, and even though the texture changes, the new shift will hold. I’ll for sure buy this again if my Normal one is still out of stock.

title: Light and Fragrance-Free!
body: Love this product! Great hold, not greasy or heavy. Washes out easily and most importantly, no annoying , offensive smell.

title: No scent at all!
body: This product is great! Most hair product lines seem to promote that fragrance is necessary. For those of us (which is at least a third of the population) that get negative reactions from chemical fragrances, this is a life saver! It works great to add texture and control to both my and my son's hair, without making us sick or having an asthma attack. Thank you so much for making a great product that everyone can use.

body: Bought this looking for a hair product for my husband that wasn't perfume-y. It really is unscented, not that weird 'unscented' that you can still smell, but actually unscented. Consistency is just right. Easy to work with, but not gooey. We will be buying this from now on. I hope they never change it

body:

Very easy to apply and to manage my hair.
Just remember to apply on damp hair (NOT dry hair) and then comb for put hair into shape.
Unscented is a good thing.

title: Works!!!
body: I have incredibly sensitive, irritable, acne-prone skin... this stuff makes my hair look awesome AND it doesn't trigger a reaction from my skin at all.

title: Unscented even for sensitive users
body: Good hold, and it really is unscented (unlike some things that have no ADDED scent, but do have an existing fragrance). Having not used a pomade like this, there's a learning curve about how much to use and how to smooth it on your fingers first so you don't get blobs that you find hours later :)

title: No More Temple Acne
body:
I purchased this because I was getting acne on my temples and forehead area. I read up on something called pomade acne because I’d been using pomade, and I figured this is what was causing it because I couldn’t find out any other reason for my acne. I used the typical pomade to style my hair, and after realizing it could be the culprit of my acne, I wanted to switch to something noncomedogenic and scent free. I have sensitive skin, so I was ready to give this a try.

I can say that it works just as well as my old pomade, but more importantly, I’ve noticed a change in my skin near my temples and forehead. This stuff has the consistency of a thick gack-like substance, but the hold and style ability is just as good as the other stuff.

title: Finally a no smell hair style pomade!
body: I love this product! I wanted something that would not make my hair shiny, did not have any perfume odor and would hold my hair in place. Just a small dab and my hair stays in place all day. Hairspray bothered my hair follicles but I can use Clean day after day. I took it to my hairstylist and she loved it too. Great product, thanks.

title: Execellent product
body: Works great specially if your sensitive to strong scented hair products or allergic to certain hair proucts. This worked well for me.

title: Does what it says but.
body: It’s an extremely good product. My biggest issue is as it runs low it begins to take on the texture of a little bit of toothpaste spilled on the counter and left to dry if that makes sense. So it became next to impossible to break down or even run into my hair. But bottom line, 100% does what it is marketed to do. Which is not clog pores. I work a job where I break a sweat and also go to the gym. And I was getting this really embarrassing head acne. Forehead. And just the side of my head under my hair. This has completely alleviated it.

title: Good
body: Good

title: Holds well
body: Great hold without any bothersome scent

title: Wish it had a smell
body: good hair product and spreads easier than most. I just wish it had some sort of smell.

title: Actually does not cause breakouts!
body: I'm a female, and it's basically impossible for me to find anything to put in my hair to style it without it causing me to break out. I have ridiculously sensitive skin and am very acne prone. I had little hope when purchasing this product, figuring that it would end up in the product graveyard under my sink with the rest. Well! I wanted to give it a few weeks of frequent use before I called it but I'm 99% sure that this does what it says! It's also completely unscented which I appreciate. I realize it's a product intended for much shorter hair than I have, and that's the reason that it's very sticky when applying. I'm sure if I had a pixie cut it would be literally perfect for styling my hair. But as it's literally the only (non-homemade) product that I can put in my hair, I can't be too choosy. Especially when, after it's actually in my hair, my hair looks great! It has a slight waxy feel but that is to be expected. It defines my waves, tames frizz, gives me a bit of soft hold and does not seem to build up on my hair. A little goes a long way! I have actually used it on my hair 3 days in a row before washing with great success. I don't think this would be good for females with super long, straight, fine hair but for me - coarse, wavy, medium length it actually works great! 24 hours after applying the waxy feeling disappears and I'm just left with hair that is soft and more tame. Thanks for making this rare product!

title: Doesn’t clog pores on my head and is scent free
body: Seems like what ever I used would clog the pores on my head and cause painful acne. I tried many different gels, creams you name it. Always got head acne. I don’t break out anywhere else. My barber told me to try this stuff after he put just a touch in my hair after my haircut. It holds my hair, non-sticky or flaky, washed out easy with just water and it not greasy. Just takes a tiny amount to work but I do have very short hair. Time will tell since I’ve only been using for a few days but so far so good.

title: Stopped forehead acne
body: Switched from big name hair products to this and thank goodness, this solved extreme forehead acne problem.

title: Truly unscented.
body: Looking for unscented? You have found it and works great, washes out easily.

title: Great fragrance free option
body: Absolutely fragrance free, and the hold is good all day.

title: I just received my order only used it once but so far it's doing the job
body: I would like a little scent and shine, but that might not be possible since it's Non-Comedogenic

title: EXCELLENT POMADE THAT WON'T MAKE ME BREAKOUT!!
body: I almost never write reviews but I really feel compelled to in this case. I'm not sure how long this product has been available, but I wish I had discovered it sooner! I need to use pomade in my hair for it to look best. The problem is that every one I've used has made me breakout into small pimples along and near my hairline. When I googled "hair pomade that won't clog your pores", I honestly didn't expect to get a single result, but to my surprise and delight, I found this product and, after seeing all the great reviews, I bought it immediately. Now I can't speak to its claim of being non-comedogenic just yet, but what I can say is that this pomade makes my hair look and feel great! Better than any other pomade I've ever used! It's light while having excellent hold, without making my hair stiff or crunchy. My first time using it, i rode my motorized scooter, with a fare amount of wind on top of it, and there wasn't a hair out of place. If this non-comedogenic claim holds true, this product is a game changer! Don't hesitate, just buy it!

title: Works
body: Much as expected, hait is softer, responds better to oils and butters

title: Strong but leaves hair sticky. Not sure how it will be if I perspire.
body: Initial hold is good. Hair is untouchable because of sticky/tacky feel and will rub off on hands. Good for people who don't plan on having their hair touched.

title: so clean holds well

title: Perfect!
body:
Love it! I had been looking for an unscented pomade that didn't make my hair feel like it had superglue in it. This is the one!

No chemical smells, no perfumes. Holds my hair while I need it to, then is easy to wash out at the end of the day.

Awesome product!!!

title: Perfect
body: Stuff rules. It makes the hair stick without leaving it greasy. Easy to wash out. Affordable. Doesn't smell. Perfect.

title: Love it
body: Smells great feels great, although it didn't really fix my dandruff. Then again that's not really the shampoo's fault my scalp just sucks big time.

title: Hit or miss
body: I’ve bought this product twice now (as all other gels and pomades I’ve tried have made my scalp break out terribly). The first time I bought it, the substance was extremely tacky (texture) and was hard to rub through my fingers and disperse evenly through my hair. It would leave small clumps throughout my hair and I switched back to my old stuff for a while. My acne returned and I decided to give it another shot. This time (a new can) the product was smooth and easily worked into my hair without issues. It gives the hair a shiny look and leaves the hair hard but I don’t mind because it got rid of my scalp breakouts. Doesn’t leave a scent and washes out pretty easy when it gets wet. Will definitely buy again.

title: Pros and Cons
body:
Really wanted to like this product, finding that tough to do.
Pros: no scent at all. Dries quick, matte finish. Super hold. Washes out easy.
Con: its so (at least my can) "rubbery". It's not at all like a cream where you can scoop a finger full. I need to really press my finger in against surface tension, and it's really cohehesive, so it doesn't stick to my finger, mostly wants to stick to itself and stay in the tin. I have to kinda pinch out a small "piece" of it and then start working it in my hands. At that point, the smooth chunks need a fair amount of direct friction to go liquid. If I don't do that there's clumps in my hair.
I like MOST everything about the product, but again at least my tin is such a struggle to get into a usable liquid state, most days I just use my old hair gel.

title: Spendy but so luxurious
body:
I've tried and liked the conditioner before, and decided to add the shampoo into the mix. It's more than my normal drug store products, and so, so worth it.

The shampoo cleanses without stripping natural oils - after trying many, many different types this is one of the only ones that leaves hair feeling clean, fresh, soft, and well... like hair should feel. While I feared the tea tree would be too strong, it's present but not overpowering.

Often peppermint in conditioners can be too minty, too strong, and leave too much of a tingly sensation behind.

In this blend it helps open sinuses while being uses, as well as the aforementioned tingle. However, it lasts only a slight amount of time after it's rinsed out, so it's pleasant rather than obnoxious.

The conditioner is thick and rich, suitable for detangling my longish hair as well as helping smooth it. The scent is an unexpectedly lovely blend of vanilla and peppermint.

title: Truly Worth Using
body:
I am updating this review after switching to another product for a year or so and coming back.

I stopped using this shampoo and conditioner for a while because I had always used 2-in-1 products before and got drawn back to the convenience. Honestly, I’ve used poor quality hair care products for so much of my life that I barely noticed when my hair got dull, frizzy and breakage-prone again. I did, however, notice when I found myself needing to cut off several inches of damaged hair for the second time in six months.

My hair looked markedly better after a single washing, and after a month it is shiny, healthy-looking and has distinct waves and curls rather than frizz. I can’t believe I quit using it in the first place, and I am amazed at the difference a high-quality shampoo and conditioner can make. My hair smells exactly like thin mint girl scout cookies, which my wife absolutely loves and comments on every time she smells my hair.

Original review below.

This shampoo and conditioner is fantastic- leaves my hair very clean, thick and soft. The shampoo has a nice tingle and both have a cooling effect, which is particularly great in the summer. I love the mint smell, too.

I was hesitant about the price, and in fact each time I re-up I hesitate again, but I can get easily six months out of a set even with hair that goes past my shoulders. A little bit goes a very long way, and I very rarely need to do a ‘rinse and repeat’ with the shampoo as it gets my hair clean enough for a full lather the first round.

Also- the longer I have used these products the healthier my hair and scalp feel. I used to get itchy and flaky in the winter but haven’t seen flakes in a very long time. Great products!

title: The only shampoo and conditioner that doesn’t give me dandruff!!! A+++++
body: Best I’ve ever used, thank you!

title: Cleans and conditions my hair making it soft and full
body: I have fine, thin hair and it has been difficult to find a product that will make my hair look fuller and feel nice and soft. I live in an area where the air is dry most of the year which drys out my hair making it feel rough. This product has solved those issue better than anything I have tried before. The Tee Tree is supposed to work well with my type of hair and it does this very well.

title: Is this real life?
body:
I try my best to always find the pros and cons to every product, but this product makes that tricky. Where has this product been all my life? I love the shampoo and conditioner so so much. I love minty eucalyptus scent and therefore am biased. I love the tingling feeling peppermint leaves behind and felt this sensation for easily a half hour to hour after each use. So if you aren't a fan of either, this may not be for you. But for me, this is perfect and I hope this product never changes!

You don't need much to get the job done. I have thick curly hair and only need a quarter sized amount to wash my hair. Some products you need giant globs, not this. The result is smooth and shiny hair. My hair feels healthy and light versus dry and heavy. This is big for me, having thick heavy hair in general. My curls retain their bounce. My ends and scalp feel great unlike the wirey feeling other shampoos cause; which I blame for dryness causing the wirey split ends.

This product is wonderful and I recommend everyone to try it at least once. I don't think you'll be disappointed. Perhaps you'll have a situation where you talk about how amazing it is that you annoy your significant other about it. I know I do. I love it that much!

Ps. He will get over it ;3

body: The best product that I have ever had. I was using another product, dove to be honest but challenger is the best, organic and family Company. 😊 my hair and skin feel so much better.

title: Really quality product
body:
First off the smell is strong initially but it dies down pretty quick once you're out of the shower, it's something akin to a Andes mint. That being said I really appreciate the fact that it smells like something that's really identifiable in the real world as opposed so made up unidentifiable nonsense.

As far as the effectiveness of the product I gave it a week after using HIMs shampoo and the difference is quite noticeable. My hair is definitely softer and cleaner feeling than with other products I've used.

As far as the people saying it makes their scalp burn, it's got a little bit of peppermint and menthol in it, and if that's enough to hurt you, you're either having an allergic reaction or you never go outside. It's refreshing but in no way does it cause any kind of discomfort, that's just wild.

They've found a customer with me, I see myself using this s long as I've still got hair.

title: Very Solid Tea Tree Shampoo/Conditioner
body:
After a few days of using all three products, I think I may have found my favorite Shampoo and Conditioner... I can confirm that the Shampoo does tingle pretty strongly, and does have a super-strong mint scent (that remains even after rinsing thoroughly). The Conditioner does seem to have a little bit of a "cooling" sensation when used after the shampoo. I can see how some might find the effect and scent overpowering, but I liked it. It also seems to be doing a better job controlling dandruff than my so-called "Dandruff Shampoo" did.

All three products are a noticeably thick consistency, which definitely makes you feel like you got your money's worth.

I was a little less impressed by the Body Wash... the "exfoliating beads" felt more like gravel to me, instead of soap. It also didn't lather as much as I would have expected from a body wash. This is more of a personal preference, so this won't effect my rating. I ordered the bundle mostly for the Shampoo and Conditioner, which both seem top-notch, so I will probably just skip the Body Wash on my next order.

I have to say, the Shampoo and Conditioner both are as good (if not better) than some of the "salon" brands I've tried in the past that cost even more. Solid product.

title: Really nice quality set for the man in your life!
body: I have to disclose that my husband is truly far from a metro-sexual male. He tries hard to avoid any feminine products. When I first saw this set I was a little nervous that he wouldn't be interested. However, suprisingly now that he is in his 60's he finally realizes how necessary it will be for him to take care of his skin as he ages. He really liked this set and actually has been spending a few extra minutes in the morning and evening developing a regimen. He told me he really likes the moisturizing cream and eye cream the best. I can definitely see an improvement in the dark circles and bags under his eyes. Highly recommend for the man in your life!

title: Anti-aging skin care for men
body: This skin care set includes serum, eye cream and moisturizer for men Rich in copper peptide this skin care is good for all skin types. You will still need to have a cleanser and toner to add to this skin care regiment if you want to take care of your skin properly.

title: LOOOOOOVE these! Great products!
body:
I had gotten the Challenger Eye Cream and absolutely LOVE it! Then, I saw the face moisturizer, so I had to try it, and I LOVED it! So, when I saw this set that had both of those AND a serum I hadn’t tried yet, I couldn’t wait to get it!

These come in nice bottles. They feel nice and look nice. Each one has a nice pump that gives you just the right amount of product. The pump works nicely every time.

The serum feels really nice. It glides onto the skin. Absorbs quickly. It doesn’t leave any tacky feeling. My skin feels smooth and hydrated.

The cream is in the thicker side, but not so thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin very easily. It absorbs quickly leaving behind a very soft, moisturized feel to the skin. This works well under my makeup too. I have normal to dry skin, with some extremely dry areas, and this works well for me. If you have skin that’s more oily, it might feel like too much for you. But, if you have dry skin, I think you’d really like this!

The eye cream is probably my favorite, but it’s hard to choose! My eyes are pretty dry. My eyelids get dry and my under eyes get really dry. Whenever I apply concealer, it will always look horrible unless I make sure my under eyes are moisturized well enough. I’ve been using Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich cream, but it’s $32 for a jar. A little of it goes a long way so it lasts me a while, but I still wanted to find a cheaper alternative. I found this, it isn’t a ton cheaper, but it’s still cheaper. Plus, I think I might like this even more than the glossier! This is a cream, but it isn’t really thick or thin. It kind of reminds me of a gel type cream consistency, but thicker than a gel. I’d say it has a medium consistency. It glides onto the skin so easily. My under eyes look SOOOOO hydrated after using it! It leaves a dewy, moisturized look to the eyes. They feel soft and smooth. My concealer goes over it so well and looks great!

This set is $49 (at the time of writing this review), which definitely seems pricey to me. But, when I consider I was paying $32 for a jar of the Glossier Priming Moisturizer Rich for under my eyes, I see it as getting 2 additional products I love for $17 more! To me, that’s a great deal! Plus, I LOVE the ingredients in each of these products! I love they are fragrance free, the way they feel on my skin, and the way they look on the skin! In addition to all that, I LOVE that these are made in the US. I don’t need to worry about if something is translated correctly or if info is going to be in English. So, I’m very happy overall!

If you’re looking for a good skin care regimen, I definitely recommend this set!
reviewer: Lover of All Things Beauty VINE VOICE

It’s lightweight but it absorbs nicely into the skin. The moisturizer is pretty thick so it keeps me hydrated all day. It is a bit greasy but for my skin type it’s perfect. The eye cream has helped with my under eye. I always a have puffy eyes in the mornings and these really helps with that. It is pretty hydrating too. This combo really focuses on hydrating. My skin feels rough after shaving and these products have helped with the texture and dryness on my skin.

title: Amazing

title: Nice set of products
body:
Challenger Men's Primo - Men's Anti Aging Trio - Face Serum, Face Moisturizer, & Eye Cream - Formulas incl. Copper Tri-Peptide, 4D Hyaluronic Acid, Aloe, Vitamin C & More - Firm Skin & Reduce Wrinkles

These three products work well together. My favorite is the Anti-Aging Eye Cream. The years have added bags under my eyes and they make me look tired all of the time. While it is not a miracle worker, I can see a reduction in the size of the bags and, especially, the darkness. Sometimes they looked almost bruised but not as much anymore. This is something that I've noticed over time. Don't expect it to work overnight. I did and I almost gave up on it. I'm glad that I stuck it out.

I don't have much of an issue with wrinkles so far, and I am hoping that the other two parts of this set keep it that way. The best thing about the face serum and moisturizer is that they are absorbed quickly and don't leave behind any oily residue. My skin is prone to breakouts and I have seen my share of them from other products I've tried over the last year. I have had no problems with breakouts using these products.

The bottles are well packaged in nice boxes with lots of information on them. They're made in the USA and that means that the literature included on the boxes is in legible English that we all can read. The bottles themselves are solid and use a pump system that doesn't include a plastic tube stuck down to the bottom of the bottle. I'm hoping that this means less waste.

As for cost - yes, these products are relatively expensive when compared to other products like them. For my purposes, they are worth it. You are getting what you pay for. And getting them in a set is less expensive that purchasing them separately. I'm impressed with this US based company and their products. I'd prefer to support US companies that make quality products with information that is written in plain English. I will be purchasing more of this product once I am done with what I have.

Overall, my boyfriend says he likes these. He says they are gentle on his sensitive skin and moisturizing. It seems like there are some good ingredients in the products as well. We can’t really speak for results when it comes to firming the skin and reducing wrinkles (those aren't huge issues at this point anyway). Results like that probably take a good bit of time as well. We do like the packaging and the fact that the products are fragrance free, not tested on animals, and made in the USA. If you are okay with the price of $49 then these may be worth a try for you.

The exfoliating works great and the scent is fresh. Typically in this cold weather my skin itches after shower but so far no dryness after using this body wash. I would definitly recommend it.

title: The Best a Man Can Get
body: This is easily the best body wash I have ever used. You just need a little and spreads on the whole body, plus it's jam packed with exfoliation. My skin is super smooth and I feel incredibly refreshed after each wash. I notice a clear advantage to the old spice, dove, and gillette men's body washes.

title: Great product combo!
body: Got these for my fiancé and he loves these products! These products are very light and don't leave your face feeling sticky or like you have a ton of product on it. The moisturizer's particularly great and leaves your face feeling moisturized the next morning. The eye cream bottle is small but a little goes a long way, which I appreciate. Overall a great product and would definitely recommend it!

title: Back for more!
body:
I received this product previously when I purchased the trio. The body wash was so great I had to come back and stock up.

I recommend this to anyway looking to make a switch away from the other chemical filled body washes on the market.

title: Would order again.
body: This is great body wash. It does a good job exfoliating my skins and leaving it soft and silky. Body wash has a nice smell and is a nice size bottle so it will last a while. Would order again.

title: Great product!
body: Great product, easy to use and nice hold!

title: Under promised but over delivered
body: I was surprised about how well this pomade held for how little I used. Initially I didn't have confidence in this product, but by the end of the first day using it, my point of view was completely flipped. I have been a user of another pomade brand for years. I also have a particular allergy to beeswax as well, so this Matte product by Challenger was viewed as an alternative for travel occasions (due to my other pomade not making travel sizes), but now, I feel like I'll make the move over to Challenger moving forward. The scent is slightly underwhelming, which isn't a negative point, realistically if it does 9 out of 10 things perfectly, that is a solid product!

title: Drying.
body: I bought the shampoo and conditioner and then for this. For some reason I thought it would be more minty. It is a masculine smell. It is nice but on the strong side so it gives me headaches. It exfoliates and ended up being too drying for my skin. I have hard water so maybe the two don't mix.

title: Adds hold but not stickiness
body: I have a full head of silver hair which becomes frizzy after shampooing. After applying anti-frizz and blow-drying, I've found that a little of Challenger Men’s Matte Cream Pomade (I call it "wax") adds additional hold and shine that lasts all day. Great hair care product - highly recommended.

title: Great budget alternative to more expensive product
body: While I prefer sumotech for my purposes, the Challenger matte paste is a suitable lower cost alternative. My mildly curly hair is between 1-2” on top for the first 2-3 weeks after a cut, and it’s nice to style it with a paste until the curls get too unwieldy. I prefer the effortless look of a matte finish. Challenger is a thick cream that spreads easy and is easy to work through your hair. It has a bit of a sticky texture to it and makes my hair easy to shape. It smells like the salon to me, which isn’t preferable but not bad. My hair had a mild shine after applying, but running my hand through my hair eliminated the shine, and over time it looked perfectly matte. Medium-firm is an accurate description. It’s not firm enough to keep my hair from curling just a bit but my hair isn’t going anywhere. Longer hair might be susceptible to some wind but it seems easy to reshape if needed. I liked the look of my hair with it. Overall, I prefer sumotech. It’s a firmer hold, it’s extremely matte, and scentless, but comparing the 1.5 oz size of each, it is not $17 better than challenger’s. I’m happy with this find!

title: Best Pomade
body: No other like it on Amazon. I can sculpt my hair perfectly upon application. Smells good too.

title: Holds amazing
body: I have super curly hair and this stuff with in seconds holds my hair, it doesn't smell bad, is a bit hard to clean off but by God this stuff holds.

title: Great
body: Great scent!!! Works great for my skin.

title: Blemish clearing body wash
body:
What I most enjoyed about this product was the ingredients. Very natural and not harsh on the skin. The exfoliating beads definitely helped clear up some of the blemishes I've always had on my upper arms where I had small red bumps due to what I think are just clogged pores. That's amazing.
What I think needs to be improved upon is the scent. I'd like it to be a bit stronger and maybe a little less "floral" smelling. It says "fresh" on the bottle, and I was expecting something zesty or minty. That's just me though. Great bodywash overall.

title: Not worry the $
body: I bought this Body wash a few weeks ago and it's been a disappointment since the 1st use. 1st off the lather that I would expect with a great body wash is not there and it's very gritty. Just don't feel like you're getting an overall deep clean with this body wash by any means. The other frustration is the opening at the top where the body wash lotion is supposed to come out was clogged up within the 1st couple of days and keeps getting reclogged. I have to open the top and manually pour out the body wash for it to work. Work. This is my 1st negative unfortunately review of something I've bought off of Amazon and hopefully it's the last.

title: Fantastic hair product for men & women!
body: My husband & I both love this matte cream pomade. He uses it on damp hair for a bit of structure & control. I work a little bit into the ends after blow drying to provide definition & finish. (Also works great taming stray baby hairs near my part.) Doesn’t flake or leave resudue behind. Also, there is no noticeable perfume in this product! (A similar product by Byrd was giving me migraines. It smelled like a scented candle.) Love this & will buy again!!

title: Works for me
body: Used it twice and so far very pleased. Applied a tiny bit to the thin hair where my scalp shows through and then fluffed up the hair to give it some lift. Stayed put and did exactly what I hoped it would. It was a little pricey but seems for my purpose it will last for quite a while.

title: Good, but a little overpriced
body: Does a decent job of keeping hair in place, but for it's size should be cheaper

title: Essential for hair styling
body: I have stayed loyal to this hair product. The Challenger Men’s Matte Cream Pomade is the only hair gel I've tried that gives my hair body and ease of styling without weighing it down or making it look/feel greasy. Would recommend.

title: Stocking Stuffer
body: Got this as a stocking stuffer, he seems to like it and says it smells really good.

title: Mild scent, storng hold, pretty long lasting
body: Overall, the pomade have a texture that is on the thicker end. For me, this pomade feels like a heavy cream that was mixed with hairspray, which makes it a stickier(?) texture, not so greasy as you would've expected for a pomade. Had to use this during graduation, so was hoping this will do its job and hold my hair up the entire ceremony, which fulfilled my expectations. This is great product, I reccommend others to try, the scent is very subtle as the title claims and little goes a long way. Most importantly, the product was pretty long lasting, my hair was up since early morning to late evening.

title: Functional Hold through the whole day
body:
I really like this stuff. At first it was a little weird but once I got used to using it I was impressed with how little I needed to use and how it held my hair in place and I could restyle throughout the day without losing the hold.
If I bump my head or have an itch I can always put my hair right back where I like it.
It has a great map texture. no shininess with a natural clean look.

title: Best One I have Tried!
body: I love how you can rock the same hair style all day without having to redo your Hair!

title: Great product
body: It's hard to find quality hair care products at reasonable prices. That all stops with Challenger Men's

title: The hold was too weak for me
body: I got a small container of this stuff to put in my travel kit. It smells nice, and it easily works into my hair. The problem is the hold isn't very strong. I find my hair starting to "fall apart" after a few hours. I ended up buying a travel size of Layrite nature matte cream pomade and that does the trick.

title: Best!
body: This product is my husband’s absolute favorite! After using this product his hair feels good, healthy and it smells good too. We’ve been ordering this product again and again and never disappointed.

title: Solid product
body: I have some thinning hair so I need something that doesn't have shine or gloss to it otherwise my hair looks thicker. Also, I need a strong hold. This product is solid. Stays in nicely, no crazy scent, matte finish, and washes out easily. I recommend giving it a try.

title: Dryer than I would like
body: It has a matte finish and holds hair well but it’s difficult to run your fingers through your hair with this product. If you are just looking for a strong hold and matte finish this will do the trick - but I need something a bit softer.

title: Solid product
body: Love the product. Solid hold, nice scent. Washes out easily. Give it ago if you’re looking for a good product. Thanks for making my hair look good. Keep up the good work.

title: Wonderful product for quick styling
body: Overall, I like the product. It smells really good (albeit doesn't last) and is easy to apply. After using for a couple of weeks I've resorted to using this cream when I need something super quick because the hold doesn't last in my hair. I end up with many strays after a couple of hours. Not a big deal - it's always good to have options for different situations.

title: Amazing!
body: I have dry, brittle hair that breaks off easily. I have tried every conditioner and many oils. I read that aloe would help and found this. It truly helps. It says for men, but I'm a lady and love it. A little pricey, but a little goes a long way, and it's worth it.

title: Not a great product
body: Product didn’t give the look I thought it would.

title: Reminds me of more expensive Aveda products...
body:
Ok, I must admit - when I first came across this "Awesome Conditioner" product I was suspicious of the name. I felt like it was Casey at the Bat pointing to the outfield. A name like this will end up being one of two things: an obnoxious brand name that under-delivers or a brand so confident in its performance that it just puts it out there simply. Awesome or not?

I will say this - I have purchased this product multiple times now, even though it is more expensive than others I like. This conditioner *is* truly awesome. The ingredients are mixed to perfection with aloe, shea butter, argan oil, coconut oil, and jojoba oil. Everything comes together nicely - the texture, the scent, the performance. I absolutely love it.

My favorite aspect of this conditioner is that there is a cooling sensation both while on the scalp and also after rinsing. My scalp feels like a cool winter breeze. This reminds me of the more expensive Aveda products in which I have sometimes indulged.

The only problem I have had is that everyone is our household now loves this product, so it goes fast. I may have to resort to a secret stash if this keeps up. So it it truly awesome? It is indeed. Highly recommend.

title: natural look, no strong odors, great price
body:
i used this product when my hair was clean and dry. i grabbed a dime size amount and rubbed between my hands, then spread thru my hair from front to back. it did not pull any of my hair out and seems like it has a good hold so far. ++there’s no shine to it, which is good bc i like a natural look.

i did spritz some hair spray for some added hold.

not a bad product for the price!

title: ound the one
body: So i hate gel and was looking for an alternative. After looking through a handful of products i found this one. I saw reviews and decided to check it out and my gosh i love it. It keeps my crazy curly hair straight and combed for a nice amount of time and its super easy to use. And when i go out with my friemds they all think i got some famcy haircut when really i still have me long not so messy hair.

title: Does not weigh down my hair.
body: Love it!

title: Best hair product out there.
body: I've tried every other hair product in the market and this is by far the best one. Its so easy to wash out and smells awesome.

title: looks and feels great. Great product
body: I finally found a seperate mens hair conditioner that is made just for men. My gray hair is now more manageable, looks and feels great. Great product.

title: I look fabulous
body: My hair has never felt better than after a wash with this. Silky smooth for a puffy pro. Repeat buy!

title: Very good product; a little on the expensive side
body: Provides a good amount of hold and tames the wayward locks. Has very minimal good smell to it. A bit on the expensive side.

title: Fantastic Product
body: I've been using the Challenger Conditioner for a few months now and I love it. I'm a big fan of the smell and how it makes my hair feel during and after use. The conditioner itself has great texture and the bottle design is sleek and attractive. Highly recommend. I will absolutely purchase again.

title: I didn't like this, but my husband loved it!!
body: I bought this to give it a try, but I didn't end up liking it. However, my husband, who only buys cheap stuff for his hair and is a notorious cheapskate. He now buys this for himself whenever he runs out, so it must be awesome.

title: Inexpensive quality product works well
body: This product works great and lasts a long time. A little goes a long way.

title: Smells great
body: Smells great and has my hair feeling great

title: Great Discovery
body:
I am not a good judge of the quality or texture of my hair. Other folks are better suited to that task hence: 'Are you doing something different with your hair?' paraphrasing the guy who cuts my hair. I confessed that I bought the challenger conditioner and used it for a bit and he said, '...because your hair is better. It's stronger, fuller.'
His words not mine, but he's correct. My hair is(was) thin and troubling. Today, it is richer, fuller and much better behaved! This is a delightful discovery. Thank you! David Chambers, Los Angeles.

title: Great product
body: Been using this product for a few months now and it is great!

title: Challenger Body wash
body: Didn’t like the scrubbing action

title: Love
body: Love this

title: Strange
body: I put this in my hair and started panicking. My head was burning and I thought my hair was going to fall out. I rinsed it out immediately but my head continued to tingle and burn as did my cheek and neck. I have VERY sensitive skin and this is just not for me. I can say though that considering it was only in my hair a few seconds at best, it works really well. I have very thick, curly hair and I was able to brush it with no tangles. It felt nice and smooth. I think if you can handle the tingling and it does not cause burning for you, this is a good product. It has a lot of good ingredients. I believe it is the peppermint in it that my scalp and skin did not like...

title: Love this brand
body:
This is the third item I've used from this brand, and I really like their commitment to using quality ingredients. Like other products I've used from the Primo line by Challenger, the face cream smells pretty... I don't know, natural, kind of planty or earthy. It's certainly not scented, which to me is refreshing compared with many skincare products. It makes my skin look and feel nice, and while I can't say that I've shaved decades off my appearance, I feel that using these Challenger products has promoted some youthfulness to my appearance, or at least slowed my aging (as I'm kind of close to staring down 40). Overall, easy to recommend!

***I write reviews as a hobby because I love trying out electronics, clothing, household products, kitchen devices, and more. My hope is that my review will guide you to make a more informed choice about whether or not to make a purchase. If this review helped you in your decision-making today, please let me know with a helpful vote. Have a great day!***

title: Leaves Face Silky Smooth
body:
I've been trying a lot of different face creams lately, and I have to admit that this is one of my favorites. It moisturizes quite well and leaves my face feeling so silky smooth. It's a great barrier cream that penetrates, yet also protects your skin from the elements. The appearance of fine lines are diminished and even some of the deeper ones are softened. Holds up all day long.

This is one of those face creams that leaves my face so silky smooth that I want to keep rubbing my fingers over my face because it feels so nice. Of course, I don't suggest that you do so.

Probably best for those with normal to dry skin. This face cream is probably a bit too rich for those with oily skin, but great for all others. I'm fine with the scent which only lasts during application.

At $20 (today's price), this is an affordable price for most consumers. I'll be honest with you, I've tried lots of other moisturizers, many above the $100 range, and I actually think that this face cream is just as good, and in a lot of cases, better than most of those. Oh, and I'm a woman, and I've been recommending this face cream to my lady friends. It really is great for both men and women.

title: Not 100% sold on this product.
body:
I love the smell and the fresh tingles it brings my hair..... but it also made my hair feel greasier than normal and frizzy. Not sure how that works.... but it did.

I am having my girls who have two different hair types test this out as well. I will update if there are any changes.

title: Not impressed with the results
body: To start off I want to explain my hair type and say that many conditioners and masks dont make much of a difference on my hair. I have long, thick, curly, and frizzy hair. It is a little bit damaged from coloring and occasionally straightening my hair. This didnt do much for my hair other than really make my scalp feel tingly and clean. This has a pretty strong menthol smell and is subtly left in your hair once you dry it, it's not very appealing to me. I did as the directions instructed and left it on for 5 minutes, but unfortunately I am not impressed with the results. Besides my scalp feeling very clean and soft, the rest of my hair is still frizzy, dry, and damaged. With the listed ingredients I at least expected my hair shaft to be soft and smooth but I cant really say that it was either of those. This feels more like a deep cleansing conditioner then anything else. It may take more than a couple washes with this conditioner to see a difference but I doubt it will do much more for me.

title: Pleasantly surprised
body: My hair stay grease less for much longer throughout the day along with being more manageable. Overall really glad that I bought something over the internet than getting the same stuff at the store. Not to mention smells better than anything I have used so far.

title: Amazing product
body: This Strong product is good. It has a really strong hold, and the finish is shiny/slick, which I like. Works best when I put it in slightly damp/towel dried hair to make for easier application. Then I let it dry in and the hold last all day long. Overall, good product

title: Many Advantages
body: I have used this Challenger product for over eight years now, and I find it to have many characteristics in its favor over similar hair products. It is not greasy, yet it provides a mild shine, enhancing the color and appearance of your hair while holding the style intact. I switched from their Matte product years ago for a little more shine and hold. I keep a thin film of water on the surface when not in use, making the product easier to apply. It has a pleasant smell, can be used sparingly, washes out easily, and comes in a durable and versatile container that can be reused. A single container will last me for several months.

title: Firm hold without looking wet
body: I love it. Finally a pomade with a firm hold that does not make your hair look sopping wet. Ive seen some reviews of it being malleable, from my experience it is not. Dries more like a gel. I have a job that I frequently sweat at, this holds up well.

title: Husband likes it
body: Well, my husband hates putting facial moisturizer on, but he's decided that this one will work. It does not have a fragrance, and it's light. It doesn't irritate his skin. He looks for something that isn't super-spendy, but isn't cheap. In other words, something that's careful with ingredients. It looks like this moisturizer has the ingredients that are most important to ME in a facial cream: shea butter, hyaluronic acid, and vitamin c. In this formulation, they have no scent or mineral oil. This works well for my husband, and the price is great.

title: Very Good Conditioner That Leaves Your Hair Softer.
body:
This is a very good hair conditioner. The product will come out a little like pudding because it is not watered down. That may be a new feeling for some (including me), as I have never had a product that did not have water as the top ingredient. That is a good thing as you are not paying for water. My hair feels and stay soft after using it. The smell is sort of like peppermint and something else and I am not crazy about it, but the scent does not stay with you. You can use a little and it goes a long way. Keep it on your head for a couple minutes and you will get the full benefit of the conditioner.

One issue I have with this conditioner is that it does not say what it is going to do on the bottle like almost every other hair product for men. Challenger should advertise that this product will make your hair softer and hydrated. If you saw it on a shelf, you probably would not buy it, because you would not really know what it does for your hair and that is a shame. It is a high quality product that will make a noticeable difference in your hair.

title: Super soft hair
body: Great value and leaves my hair super soft

title: Great on my man face
body:
I don’t care for many lotions as they always turn out greasy, or extremely thick. This stuff is pretty light and makes me feel rejuvenated. It’s made for men so it holds up to my facial hair and neglect I give my skin.
Smells nice and works as it should

title: Control
body: I got this for my twelve year old grandson who has that hairdo that is very long on top and this keeps it controlled

title: Creamy, Leaves Skin Soft, Smooth, and Moisturized! My normal to dry skin loves it!
body:
I had gotten the Challenger Eye Cream and absolutely LOVE it, so when I saw this, I immediately wanted to try it!

This comes in the same kind of bottle with a pump that the eye cream came in. The pump works nicely. It gives you enough product for your whole face. The cream is in the thicker side, but not so thick where it feels heavy or takes a long time to rub in. It glides onto the skin very easily. It absorbs quickly leaving behind a very soft, moisturized feel to the skin. This works well under my makeup too. I have normal to dry skin, with some extremely dry areas, and this works well for me. If you have skin that’s more oily, it might feel like too much for you. But, if you have dry skin, I think you’d really like this!
reviewer: Lover of All Things Beauty VINE VOICE

title: Awesome product!!! Now my morning routine!
body: Thank you Challenger! I just became your biggest fan. Definitely works best when my hair is damp when I put it on. Always a strong hold as the name implies, and adds a good amount of shine that I've been complimented on a few times :). Always looks slick. Definitely recommend!

title: The smell is incredible.
body: This Challenger Conditioner smells so good! It’s a little peppermint mixed with Shea butter smell in one which i think is more appealing to women then men. It is creamy and thick like Shea butter. I tried it but my hair is dry and needs more a more moisturizing conditioner tho it did work I had to add leave in conditioner to my ends. My husband said it was great and left his hair softer than shampoo alone. It came cellophane packaged to prevent leaks. It’s sulfate free, safe for color treated and made in the good ole USA.

title: Strong hold
body:
Purchased this for my husband, he is super picky and doesn't like anything that is too heavy or too shiny.
He likes that this product last all day, has a strong hold and "was the perfect amount of shine"

title: Works ok
body: It was just ok. Hard to work into hair and is very sticky. Dries hard like a gel and not like a paste or clay.

title: Super strong for sure
body: Used it once, it’s was almost impossible to get worked into my hair. It’s the thickest hair cream ever. Definitely held, but if you have longer hair it might rip it out. I still prefer the medium hold, but if you have short hair and want it to never move this might be the product for you.

title: They asked for a review
body:
They asked me to review politely. Thi is my honest review.
I have thick straight Asian hair, and it works at either length hair at 2 inch vs at .5 inch when I cut it. It works well.
I am extremely active and participate in high level sports and it doesn't come off. I have hyperchondrosis. It washes off clean and easily.
I dislike artificial chemical scents or any scents.
It's not grainy, rubbery, or shiny.
Hold is relatively strong for shorter hair, and medium hold for longer hair.
I chose this so when I sweat it doesn't get in my eyes and cause super irritation. Also so I can wash it out with hand soap right before training.
10/10 would buy again. A bit expensive, I'd like to see the price a bit lower, but I don't mind paying for quality over quantity. It's not expensive comparitively to other brands anyway.
Thanks. Try it. I've used it for a few months.

title: Strong Hold. Slick Finish.
body: Am pleased with this product. Usually use Challenger Blue, but this caught my eye. Hold is strong and I like the amount of shine the semi-matte finish has.

title: Holds well, mild disappearing odor
body: While this product states that there is no fragrance added, it does have a mild odor which disappears quickly. This is the first pomade type product that I've used, and it does hold very well. If needed later in the day, a wet comb will fix you right up.

title: No scent which is perfect
body: Review from my boyfriend; “I like this because it does not give off a scent which does not interfere with my allergies or my cologne. It is also non-greasy. My cousin stole mine because of the scent less thing so I had to order more.”

title: Will keep your hair just like you want
body: This product is really good, it has strong hold, and I keep my hair style all day long. Recommended

title: Strong hair product!
body: Really like the product. I have long hair so need something strong, and the hold works well for me. Also like the shine it provides. A definite recommend for me!

title: Best Pomade I have ever used
body: Got the free sampler first, loved all the products. However, the Matte pomade is my favorite. I use it both on my hair and beard, it has a strong hold and blends in perfectly without having any weird residue. Found my new everyday pomade.

title: Perfect product for my hair
body: The matte pomade is the best product I have ever used on my hair. It doesn't smell and stays there all day.

title: Fresh Body Wash - Refreshing Cleanliness, Lasting Freshness!
body: Fresh Body Wash is a game-changer! It cleanses effectively, leaving my skin clean and smooth. With gentle exfoliating beads, it provides a refreshing scrub using either my hand or a loofah. The fragrance is subtle yet invigorating, ensuring a lasting fresh scent. The high-quality ingredients, including Aloe, Vitamin E, Tea Tree Oil, Jojoba Oil, and Silk Amino Acids, nourish and hydrate my skin. It's a reliable choice for combating body odor in sensitive areas like the pits and groin. Fresh Body Wash is a must-have for those seeking a quality body wash that delivers cleanliness and long-lasting freshness.

title: One of the best hair pomade cream in the market.
body: I’ve used the pomade cream on my hair. I was amazed it’s like I don’t wear any hair products on my hair. It’s so light and clean. I couldn’t ask for more. I’m so contented. I usually breaks out. It’s good to know that it won’t clogged pores. I would definitely recommend it.

title: It's good and doesn't feel super greasy!
body: It does as is advertised! It gives a light hold, which was perfect for me at the time with longer hair that I just wanted have lightly pushed back, but without being super greasy, or making me breakout on my scalp or hairline, doesn't clog pores! Not ideal if you want a firm hold though, I'm not sure if they make one with a firmer hold, but if they do I'd definitely buy it!

title: Life altering
body: I've been using this product for 2 months now and it's completely stopped my hair from falling out. A+

title: God bless pomades
body: Love in here .

title: Best hair product for sensitive acne-prone skin!
body:
I've been struggling with acne for years and after switching to using the clean pomade from Challenger my skin has improved drastically! I was experiencing forehead acne for a while and decided to switch to a non-comedogenic hair product to see if it would fix the problem and it did! I've been using this product for about 6 months now and it has done wonders for my skin and for my hair. It's great for hair styling and won't clog your pores like other hair products.

Worth every penny. I genuinely want to thank Challenger so much for helping cure my acne. This product deserves more recognition.

title: Bruhhhhhhhh
body: Siiiiick

title: A Staple In My Personal Care Routine
body: Highly recommended for men who appreciate both functionality and style in their personal care products.

title: THE REAL DEAL!
body:
This product is everything I’ve been searching for!

I have sensitive skin and deal with occasional acne and breakouts. I’ve tried WAY too many hair products to count and all have failed to deliver on everything I’ve been looking for. 

I have curly hair and have found that I like cream-based pomades for the way they clean everything up but still look natural. I also HATE using products that run down my face and make my forehead look like a wet seal. 

Enter: The Challenger Clean Cream. IT CHANGED THE GAME! At first, the texture felt a little wonky and inflexible, but when I applied it, worked it in and—amazing! 

Great medium-firm hold. Nice matte look. It washes out incredibly easy and the best part—the first product I’ve found that doesn’t run down my face meaning, NO MORE OFS (oily forehead syndrome). 

1000% recommend!!

title: The Best I've Found
body: I have thick, heavy hair, so finding a pomade that actually styles it has been a struggle. This is the best I've found, and it actually holds my hair in place for most of the workday. There's no grease or additional shine; I love how natural my hair looks after I've applied the pomade. It took me a bit to get used to the texture of it in the container, but it doesn't bother me now, and I appreciate that it has no fragrance. I have also sensitive skin, and this pomade hasn't caused any breakouts, even if I forget to wash it out of my hair at the end of the night.

title: Great product and fragrance free
body: Great product and fragrance free never seem to used together with things we have to buy with my wife's severe allergies.  I get so frustrated settling for lower quality products at higher prices trying to prevent allergic reactions she encounters.  I'm so satisfied with Challenger pomade.  I wish that there were more companies that took the fragrance-free statement serious, without producing worthless products.  This is a fantastic product that I will continue to use.  Thank you Challenger.

title: The 1.5 oz. size has been a "miss", but otherwise, fantastic product!
body:
I want to start by saying that the customer service is fantastic! Twice now, they have tried to "right a wrong" and have been very responsive.  For some reason, the travel size stock seems to be bad. On every order over the last year, between directly through the company here, or Amazon, the travel size container has been outdated, dried up and unusable. 
I want to thank Challenger for trying to make things write. They sent me replacement containers, but unfortunately, only the large size was usable. I have included a photo, showing the difference in the products received in November 2023. In the photo, the top one was the large 3 oz. container, which was perfect. The other three were travel size ones that I received together.  I honestly, think that Challenger should not shrink wrap these until they are about to send them out. They should inspect the product first, then put the plastic shrink wrap on and send it out after inspection.  I feel this is a fair review based on the lack of consistency in  the product, but like I said, the customer service is fantastic.

So in comes this eye cream into my newly found regiment. I’m using this before my serum at night and in the morning on it’s own. THe bottle is only an ounce but that has lasted me weeks now with more in the bottle to go. It takes the tiniest of bits pumped out and then worked into the skin around the eyes. It absorbs quickly even after a shower. There is no strong scent to this and I’ve had no reaction or drying of the skin when used even twice a day. Overall I’m happy with the results after a couple weeks & plan to keep it as part of my daily routine no matter how much of my face is getting shown off to come.

title: Love this product!
body: So glad I found this product. I used another brand for 3 years that worked great and made my hair as dense as it was in high school (and this was after losing a lot to cancer treatments). It quit working for me and my husband at the same time and my hair began falling out. After researching, I found Hair Keep and it immediately made my hair healthier. After using it for 3-4 months now, I'm hooked. My hair is slowly growing back in. From my past experience, it will probably take about a year for it to reach maximum density, but that could just be because of the chemo I had. One hint to make it more effective is that I shampoo once with a small amount, rinse and repeat. Leave the second wash in for the remainder of your shower to let the Capiyxl work. This helps you get a better lather on the second wash. The first wash doesn't lather much. To increase the lather even more, rub the shampoo between your hands until it lathers before putting it on your hair. The conditioner is so rich, it doesn't need to stay in my hair long at all.

title: Earthy smell, thicker than other serums I've seen, but great stuff!
body:
I've used a number of Challenger's Men's Primo facial products, and it's become a brand I trust and like. The pricing is fair compared with many beauty and self-care products (especially the stuff my wife buys... OMG!), and I really like the natural ingredients. This serum, like other creams and moisturizers I've used from this brand, has a natural, earthy smell. It seems not to be perfumed or scented apart from by the ingredients it contains as part of the serum. That may not be for everyone, but I like it. It definitely brings to mind plants. It's very thick compared with the serums I've seen my wife using. It's not fully opaque, but it's very cloudy. Overall, it leaves my face feeling and looking good, and I hope with prolonged use of this and other products from this brand, I'll at least maintain a more youthful visage as I continue to get older. Easy to recommend!

***I write reviews as a hobby because I love trying out electronics, clothing, household products, kitchen devices, and more. My hope is that my review will guide you to make a more informed choice about whether or not to make a purchase. If this review helped you in your decision-making today, please let me know with a helpful vote. Have a great day!***

title: Moderate hair benefits and a great smell
body:
As a big fan of Challenger products, I was eager to try this, especially as family members have noted the beginning of a thinning patch of hair on my crown…...could the Hair Keep stimulate new growth up there overnight? Er…..no. But it certainly feels like it's doing something, mainly to make hair feel thicker and stronger. And to be fair, full results may take more time to achieve.

With an impressive list of ingredients that might feature in NASA's next propellant or be the basis of a formula for eternal youth, this thick conditioner smells absolutely fantastic. And the scent seems to stick around on your hair for longer than most. Whatever the concoction is doing on your head while you leave it on (minimum of 4 minutes recommended), it feels like a menthol or tea-tree product is doing its thing, a cold and invigorating feeling. A little goes a long way, too…. a walnut-sized amount should be enough for most guys. Or gals.

An unexpected benefit I noted was fewer flakes of dandruff and dry patches of skin over my ears….looks like this conditioner improves your scalp health too, even though it's not specifically intended for that.

In short, another carefully crafted product from the Challenger team, with pleasing results.I plan to keep on using it so that long term effects can be determined. And that smell…..

It's made from all kinds of good stuff most of which I don't know a lot about but have heard the buzz words/terminology before. Such as Baicapil, Rejuvasoft, HairSpa, Caffeine, Biotin, Hyaluronic Acid, Keratin, Copper Tri-Peptide 1, Saw Palmetto, DHT Blockers, and more. The bottle shape is thin and sleek kind of reminded me of lubricant. A little goes a long way which I really appreciate. Definitely love and would recommend this stuff!

body: Pros: Is cruelty free/no animal testing. Made in the USA. Water based/water soluble. Perfect for clean, sleek, professional pulled back long haired styles. Superb hold without flakiness. Subtle clean scent that is sublime enough for wearing in a hospital setting. The company logo, Enso is one of my favorite symbols.

title: Great conditioner
body: My son uses DHT shampoo and conditioner and decided to try this conditioner to use with shampoo he already has. He says it works really well and his hair feels healthy and soft after use. He has a little bit of hair loss but is trying to delay any additional loss. It has thinned and he's not old, so he's careful to only buy DHT blocking shampoo and conditioner, although he doesn't take any oral supplements for it. After using this for a short while, he says there is no increase in hair in the shower (there was prior to using any DHT blocker. He doesn't know if it's better or worse than others he uses, but his hair feels healthy and there is a normal amount of hair in the drain. So, if you're searching for a DHT conditioner, this one does seem to work, although he's using a different brand shampoo.

title: Very nice, low smell pommade
body: I ordered this because I wanted to have a smaller version for travel (I bought the two-size package) and the product I used to use did not have a travel size. It's a very nice pomade, I don't like products with a lot of smell, and this one is subdued, it applies easily and holds well. The only reason I gave it a 4-star is I generally prefer cream (wax, fiber, they are variously described) matte products and I did not see Challenger had one. This is a solid pomade, buy with confidence. I'm about to go rate their Challenger Matte Cream Pomade, Medium-Firm Hold product a full 5-stars. I will try other products this company makes.

title: 1.7oz of Pure Moisture
body:
Our skin takes a beaten but I feel this serum does a good job in replenishing it. This is a serum not a cream so it is greaser than a cream you place on. I spot tested in an area with no issues so I went full force in placing on half my face in troubled areas and within minutes I could feel it working. NO tingling or burning just a slight warming or feeling of difference on that side of the face. I feel over time this will do some repair and wonders with my skin in remoistening it.
The scent is gentle and neutral, nothing over fragranced.
There is an air tight pump that is used to pump out the serum, no tube inside so I hope it works when bottle gets close to the bottom.
The list of ingredients is longer than I would like but there are some benefits of paraben free, made in USA and Hormone free.

This is a good enough replacement, and when I need to look good I am pleased to have this. I don't feel like I am harming my health by using it; the product has a clear, pure feeling.
